creator: peter.henderson@ieee.org
text:
Created attachment 146975
Error dump from Wine.

After upgrading i386-wine-compholio-1.7.24,1 to i386-wine-compholio-1.7.25,1, playing flash videos caused an error message box to popup.

Reinstalling pipelight-0.2.7.3_1 and deleting .wine-pipelight did not fix the problem.  A simple flash game, with sound, still worked.

What fixed the problem was to enable hardware acceleration and to increase local storage from the minimum of none to 10MB.

I am using:
FreeBSD  9.1-RELEASE-p17 FreeBSD 9.1-RELEASE-p17 #0 r268477: Thu Jul 10 12:56:00 EST 2014     root@:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/GENERIC  amd64

i386-wine-compholio-1.7.25,1
pipelight-0.2.7.3_1
Adobe Flash Player 14.0.0.145

I've attached the error dump provided by Wine.
